headline: Benzinga's Weekly Bulls And Bears: Eli Lilly, Ford, GameStop, Intel, McDonald's And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The week's bullish calls included aerospace, automaker and pharmaceutical giants.
	A leading semiconductor maker and a struggling retailer were among the bearish calls.

headline: Blackberry Shares Are Soaring To Start 2021, As Investors Eye Catalysts
summary:
BlackBerry's Network Operations Center in Waterloo, Canada

Shares of Blackberry Ltd. (NYSE: BB) are up almost 120% this month as investors have become excited about the company's recent announcements.

headline: AT&T Reportedly In Talks To Sell Piece Of DirecTV To Private Equity Firm
summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE: T) could be about to make a move that would make income investors happy.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Jan 24-30): J&J, Lilly to Kickstart Big Pharma Earnings, Amgen FDA Decision and More
summary: Biopharma stocks advanced yet again in the week ended Jan. 22, with the change of guard at the White House generating broader market strength.

headline: Tesla Accuses Employee Who Worked For Company For Less Than 2 Weeks Of Stealing Trade Secrets
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) on Friday sued a former employee over claims of stealing trade secrets.
